lines.text: The ancient Vampire Queen’s voice was ice-cold over the enchanted mirror.

lines.speaker: Queen Charlotte
lines.text: Lead the raid on Meadowbrook tonight. The court is starving.

lines.speaker: Queen Charlotte
lines.text: Bring back enough warm bodies to sate us… or you will be the one drained instead, my dear Lilith.
Lilith lowered her head, black lace frills trembling slightly.

lines.speaker: Lilith
lines.text: …Yes, Your Majesty. As you command.
The night air reeked of smoke and blood. Lesser vampires swarmed the once-peaceful village of Meadowbrook like locusts.
Screams echoed between burning cottages and trampled flower fields. Lilith watched from above, jaw tight, hating every second of it.

lines.speaker: Lilith
lines.text: (inner thought) I hate this…

lines.speaker: Lilith
lines.text: But if I disobey Queen Charlotte… everyone under my command will suffer.
In the chaos, a young woman with flower ribbons in her braided hair stumbled out of her small bakery, eyes wide with terror.

lines.speaker: Elara
lines.text: (panicked, breathless) No… no no no! Mama? Papa?!

lines.speaker: Elara
lines.text: My home… everything is burning… This can’t be real!
She ran toward the orchard, but it was too late. Two lesser vampires cornered her against an old stone wall, fangs bared, eyes glowing with hunger.

lines.speaker: Lesser Vampire 1
lines.text: Look at this soft one… so full of warm blood.

lines.speaker: Lesser Vampire 2
lines.text: She’s mine! I get the first taste!

lines.speaker: Lesser Vampire 2
lines.text: She’s mine! I get the first taste!

lines.speaker: Elara
lines.text: Please… I don’t want to die…
Suddenly, a strong voice cuts through the night.

lines.speaker: Lilith
lines.text: HALT!
The lesser vampires froze instantly. Lilith descended gracefully, her goth-lolita dress fluttering in the night wind, crimson ribbons trailing behind her.
She stepped between her minions and the trembling human.
Elara pressed herself against the cold stone, tears streaking her cheeks, already accepting death.
Yet when Lilith approached, there was no violence in her steps — only intent.
Lilith gently tilted Elara’s chin upward with a gloved hand. Their eyes met.
Then Lilith leaned in slowly.
Her fangs sank into the soft skin of Elara’s neck with deliberate, sensual care — a deep, lingering bite.

lines.speaker: Elara
lines.text: Nngh…! Ahh…
A shaky moan escaped her as a strange warmth spread through her body.
Lilith’s free hand slid to Elara’s waist, pulling her closer.

lines.speaker: Lilith
lines.text: (soft, almost moaning)

lines.speaker: Lilith
lines.text: …You’re different.
Elara’s knees weakened. Pain and unexpected pleasure twisted together.
When Lilith finally pulled back, a thin trail of blood ran down Elara’s collarbone.
Elara’s vision blurred. Her body went limp in Lilith’s arms as consciousness slipped away.
